title: Salter EK5831BMA Marble 1.7 L Kettle – Rapid Boil, 360° Swivel Base, Removable Limescale Filter, Water Level Indicator, Unique Marble Design, Boil Dry Sensor & Auto Shut-Off, Otter Controller, 3000W
features: LARGE 1.7 LITRE CAPACITY: Make brews for the family and guests with our marble effect kettle, with an impressive 1.7 litre capacity.
360° SWIVEL BASE: The swivel base makes it easy for both left and right handed users no matter where it’s placed on your kitchen countertop.
REMOVABLE LIMESCALE FILTER: With a built-in limescale filter that can be easily removed to clean and pop straight back in!
BOIL DRY SENSOR & AUTO SHUT-OFF: For added safety, our kettle has a boil dry sensor and auto shut-off for when you forget about your brew.

MATCHING SET: Add a touch of the latest trends to your home and coordinate your kitchen with our contemporary marble collection. Every Salter Marble kettle and toaster will have a unique and different marble pattern due to how it is produced.
